title: Abiraterone with food
body:
I take 21 pills a day.  One at night.  One in AM.  And four Abiraterone 2 hours after a meal or one before.  I have to spend an hour a week putting my pills into the right containers, and because of that, I sometimes. miss something. 

I'll discuss with my doctor this week.  If true, I can simplify all my pill taking, reduce the number of pills I take, make it simple to set out what needs to be taken and reduce my costs.

Has anyone else done this?

  
[https://www.cancer.gov/news-events/cancer-currents-blog/2018/prostate-cancer-abiraterone-food-low-dose](https://www.cancer.gov/news-events/cancer-currents-blog/2018/prostate-cancer-abiraterone-food-low-dose)

  
There have been some cautionary statements as the test was small.  I found a number of similar articles going back to 2014.

70% OF Research funding comes from the pharmaceutical cos.  How do you think then will respond to someone wanting to do research on cutting the sales of their drug by 75%?

Federal money limits the salaries of researchers. n

Trying this SEEMS to be logical.  At least I can take one with a meal if I can't find a 3-hour persiod wi8thout food.
